News.Title: Initial public release
News.SubTitle: First public build: roles, modifiers, and audio for Town Of Us - Mira
Text: This is the first public release of Divani Mods, a content add-on for Town Of Us - Mira.
It adds several new roles and modifiers on top of the base mod, plus custom intro sounds and ability SFX where it makes sense.

Temporarily disables all crewmate tasks with a Lockdown ability. You still have a normal kill button, and you earn extra lockdown charges when you get kills. The lockdown timer pauses during meetings and ejections, and the HUD timer hides while a meeting is open.

Use Pickpocket on nearby players to steal one of their modifiers. If they have none, they may receive a random modifier instead. Stolen modifiers are synced for everyone and show correctly on the end-game summary.
Place two portals on the map. After both are down, any living player (including you) can teleport between them.
Win by infecting every living player. You have a direct Infect ability, and infected players passively spread to others who stand near them long enough. Includes a custom intro line and infect sound.
Blindspot (Crewmate): Using cameras does not light the red “being watched” indicator for others.
Fragile (Universal): You can “break” (die instantly) when another player interacts with you; the triggering player may hear a glass-break SFX.
Ruthless (Impostor): Your kills bypass Medic shields, Guardian Angel protection, and Survivor vests.
Shuffle (Universal): Teleport every living player to another random living player’s position. Ghosts are never shuffled; you can optionally shuffle dead bodies.
Role intros for Thief, Portalmaker, Deadlock, and Plague Doctor.
Infect SFX for Plague Doctor, glass-break for Fragile, and a place-portal sound for Portalmaker.
Among Us (Steam), BepInEx IL2CPP 6.x, Reactor, MiraAPI, and Town Of Us - Mira.

News.Title: Misvote and Dutch soundpack
News.SubTitle: New universal modifier plus optional lobby sound swap
Text: Small follow-up release with one new modifier and an optional sound pack toggle.

Whenever you vote, including if you vote Skip, your vote is redirected to a random living player. The redirect is meant to work with extra vote rules (for example Mayor, Knighted, and Prosecutor) so everything stays in sync.
Replaces normal door open/close sounds with the pack’s clips when the toggle is enabled.
Among Us (Steam), BepInEx IL2CPP 6.x, Reactor, MiraAPI, and Town Of Us - Mira.

News.Title: Sentinel and stability pass
News.SubTitle: New crew role plus a pile of meeting, UI, and vote fixes
Text: This update adds the Sentinel and fixes several issues reported around portals, meetings, Plague Doctor, Shuffle, and Misvote stacking.
Place beacons to watch areas of the map. When enabled in options, beacon activity can be summarized in chat at the start of meetings.
- Portalmaker range is set to a stable value without line-of-sight tricks.
- Portalmaker and Sentinel buttons no longer appear during meetings.
- Plague Doctor infection icons no longer clip through the map in meetings, and they also show during normal gameplay.
- Plague Doctor UI is shown to the Plague Doctor (not only to dead observers), and win / task behaviour is tracked more reliably.
- Plague Doctor can no longer complete crew tasks while playing that role.
- Shuffle no longer yanks ghosts out of their tasks.
- Misvote now lines up correctly when combined with Mayor multi-votes, Knighted extras, and Prosecutor prosecutions.

News.Title: More roles, modifiers, and polish
News.SubTitle: Frag, Silencer, Innocent, Opportunist, Bear Trap, Sniper, Keybinds, Mod News, Icons, and balance fixes
Text: Divani Mods 1.1.0 adds new roles, new modifiers, keybind support, and several gameplay fixes.
Starts a hot-potato time bomb that can be passed between players before it explodes.
Cuts meeting voting time with each kill, down to a configurable minimum voting time.
Taunts another player into killing them, then wins if that killer is voted out in the next meeting.
Collects votes from targets they vote for and wins after reaching the configured vote threshold.
Freezes the killer after the Bear Trap holder dies and prevents them from reporting the body while frozen.
Lets Neutral Killing roles kill from farther away without teleporting to the target.
- Keybind support for Divani Mods buttons.
- Mod News: Divani patch notes appear in the Among Us announcements list alongside Town Of Us.
- New Plague Doctor inherits infection state from the previous Plague Doctor (e.g. when Amnesiac remembers a dead PD).
- Misvote now correctly picks a random target from all alive players.
- Added better checks for button modifiers.
- Ruthless now kills through First Death Shield.
- Fixed some task behaviours when Lockdown is called.
- Misvote now also counts a random vote if the player does not vote.
- Shuffle button is now hidden when dead.
- Thief no longer receives more than one button modifier.
- Shuffle is now correctly listed as a button modifier.
- Improved modifier options so they are more grouped, matching source TOU Mira more closely.
- Added role and modifier icons provided by Atony (Mira Dev).
- Sentinel “uses left” is not always correct (visual bug).
- Previous Plague Doctor is not removed from the winners screen when Amnesiac inherits PD (Town Of Us end-game display).
Among Us (Steam), BepInEx IL2CPP 6.x, Reactor, MiraAPI, and Town Of Us - Mira.

News.Title: Hotfix for Portalmaker, Ruthless and Thief option, Sentinel and Portalmaker delay
News.SubTitle: Alliance stealing, heartbreak option, first-death-shield toggle, 3s portal/beacon place
Text: Thief can steal Alliance modifiers including Lover, re-pairing the Thief with the other partner. Optional Stealing Lover Breaks Their Heart kills the player who lost Lover after the swap.
Thief: Steal Lover (and other Alliance modifiers); optional heartbreak for the old lover.
- Portalmaker & Sentinel: 3-second placement delay; position locked on button press (like Sentry).
- Sentinel “uses left” is not always correct (visual bug).
- Previous Plague Doctor is not removed from the winners screen when Amnesiac inherits PD (Town Of Us end-game display).
Among Us (Steam), BepInEx IL2CPP 6.x, Reactor, MiraAPI, and Town Of Us - Mira.

News.Title: Recruiter joins the squad: button fixes
News.SubTitle: New Recruiter & Bloody; keybinds respect meetings; tidier folders
Text: Recruiter joins the squad. Divani ability buttons now behave like core Town Of Us Mira buttons, so keybinds no longer fire during meetings or while chat is open.

During the first meeting only, recruit one non-Impostor: tap the toggle on a nameplate to mark them; when the meeting ends, they become a vanilla Impostor (optional Impostor Assassin behaviour in options).
If someone kills a Bloody crewmate, the killer leaves a trail of red footprints for a configurable time, with spacing by distance or time and other tuning in options.
- Tidier codebase with clearer folder layout.
- Divani ability keybinds could trigger during meetings; abilities now use TownOfUsButton / TownOfUsTargetButton so they follow the same meeting and chat rules as core TOU.
- Sentinel “uses left” is not always correct (visual bug).
- Previous Plague Doctor is not removed from the winners screen when Amnesiac inherits PD (Town Of Us end-game display).
Among Us (Steam), BepInEx IL2CPP 6.x, Reactor, MiraAPI, and Town Of Us - Mira.

News.Title: Thief, Silencer, Frag and Plague Doctor update
News.SubTitle: Neutral alliance changes, new PD/Silencer options, meeting fixes
Text: This update focuses on Thief, Silencer, Frag, and Plague Doctor changes.
- Thief now gets a random modifier if it tries to steal one it already has.
- Thief now prioritizes stealing the Frag bomb if the target has it.
- New option: Normal Voting Time When Dead. If enabled, voting time returns to its initial value after Silencer dies.
- When a meeting is called, the bomb holder is bombed at the start of the meeting.
- Better infection progress display in the task header.
- New option: Turn into Amnesiac when cannot win.
- New option: Notify Players When Infection Is Close.
- New sub-option: Notify When Uninfected Players Left.
- Frag bomb button no longer sometimes appears in meetings.
- Shuffle can no longer be used in meetings by using its keybind.
- Fixed button uses left on Sentinel.
- Crewmate modifiers can no longer be assigned to Neutral factions.
- Old Plague Doctor shows up in win screen if new PD is inherited from Amnesiac.
- Enable portals after the first meeting option.
- Portalmaker can portal to both portals from anywhere option.

News.Title: Thief random pool fix
News.SubTitle: Alliance modifiers excluded from Thief random pool
Text: Small fix for the Thief random modifier pool.
- Thief: Alliance modifiers (e.g. Lover, Crewpostor, Egotist) are no longer in the random modifier pool when Thief steals from a target with nothing to steal.

News.Title: Demolitionist & Memento
News.SubTitle: New role, new modifier, and changes across Frag, Portalmaker, Sentinel, Thief, Plague Doctor, and more
Text: Plant bombs for your other shipmates to defuse. Detonate x bombs to win! (configurable)
Choose for a timed plant version, or take it to the next level and enable the Numpad Sabotage style.
Thanks @jaydoeswitchcraft for the role and button assets
Reveal information about what your identity was during meetings.
One of the options include to even show all the modifiers a Memento holder had (Yes, also bait. BUSTED!!!!)
- Special thanks to asterisken (discord) for making the modifier icon
- Changed Frag role color to match icon color
- Added a better way of displaying the difference between arming and armed state for the role holder in the button
- Fixed heartbeat sounds from looping after leaving/DC
- Added configurable effect duration (the delay between clicking the button and placing a portal)
- Added option to enable the portal pair after the next meeting
- Added configurable effect duration (the delay between clicking the button and placing a beacon)
- Added configurable effect duration (the delay between clicking the button and pickpocketing a modifier)
- Refactored role to now work around a hidden modifier
- New modifier icon. Special thanks to @jaydoeswitchcraft
- Cleric now cleanses negative effects of Roles and Modifiers from Divani Mods (if i missed any let me knmow)
- Added Causes of Death for Murders inside Divani mods (Silenced,Shattered,Fragged)
- I listen to your feedback, changed some of the default values for Roles/Modifier Options

News.Title: Domesmith, Summoner & Revenant, Sprout
News.SubTitle: Two new roles, an Impostor ghost, a new modifier, plus tuning and bugfixes
Text: Use your dome shield to protect groups (limited use).
Watch out for Ruthless still — they show no mercy!
Bring the dead to life, and bring them to your side! Select a dead shipmate in a meeting to summon them as a ghost Impostor role (Revenant).
A Revenant can kill and vent, but can also be clicked like a Haunter — putting them to rest as an Impostor ghost.
Once revented (has been Revenant), you can no longer see the roles of alive non-Impostors.
One-time ability to gain a modifier from a dead body. Non-allowed modifiers turn into valid ones (Thief-like).
- Fixed inconsistencies with button visibilities (Demolitionist, Portalmaker).
- Fixed Thief Pickpocket button not being usable during Comms sabotage.
- Portals are properly destroyed when a game ends.
- Added option to enable/disable random prosecute.
- Changed default for Shuffle Dead Bodies to true.
- Added Wildcard option to make skip votes count once.
- Added option for the role holder to teleport to either of their portals from anywhere.
- Role options match the newer Mira format.
- Added more intro sounds for roles that didn't have one yet.

News.Title: Hotfixes
News.SubTitle: Demolitionist sabotage and Revenant body fixes
Text: - Fixed Demolitionist sabotage not being destroyed on body reports.
- Fixed Domesmith not being networked properly (now uses yellow sprite from trapper).
- Recruiter take one of the Impostor slots (option)

News.Title: New roles, modifiers, and Starlight support (pending)
News.SubTitle: Mosquito, Obfuscator, Cunctator plus three crew modifiers and fixes
Text: Some new Impostor roles and modifiers join Divani Mods!
Starlight Support should be covered. This shouldn't take long now!
Launch a mosquito that flies to a target and stings it to death. Auto-target the furthest player or pick one with a selection tablet; charge-based with an optional Aimbot Mode.
Swap votes between two players during meetings. Always resolves after a regular Swapper.
Bodies of those you kill only appear after a configurable delay.
Skilled (Crewmate Utility): Fix two-part sabotages (reactor, oxygen) on your own.
Strong (Crewmate Passive): Cannot be guessed in meetings.
- Sniper now works across Neutral Killing roles (Serial Killer supported) and no longer teleports on the kill.
- Domesmith domes are now visible to dead players.
- Plague Doctor infected symbol is now visible to dead players.
- Thief and Sprout can no longer steal/collect Knighted, and only interact with Town Of Us - Mira and Divani Mods modifiers.
- Recruiter moved to Impostor Power and now takes one of the Impostor role slots.
- Summoner description updated to cover the Revenant and the final-4 win check.
- Portalmaker portals are now animated; Use Portal uses the in-game Use button (Starlight support); teleport button moved to the right.
- Demolitionist Defuse now uses the in-game Use button (Starlight support).
- New Rainbow Camouflaged Comms lobby option: camouflage-comms colors players rainbow instead of grey.
- Innocent now has its own intro sound.

News.Title: Portalmaker Use button hotfix + new assets
News.SubTitle: Use Portal works with pets, Mosquito reclassified, new button icons
Text: Hotfix for the Portalmaker Use Portal button plus new assets.
- Portalmaker Use Portal button (which overrides the in-game Use button) now also works with pets enabled.
- Mosquito moved to the Impostor Killing faction.
- New button icons for Frag, Plague Doctor, and Shuffle (thanks Xinav <3).
- Renamed "Bomb" to "Frag" in Frag's options and button labels to match the timer and role name.

News.Title: Duelist and Armored join Divani Mods!
News.SubTitle: Fixed a major bug with mosquito sting cooldown + some other tweaks
Text: Duelist and Armored join Divani Mods!
Fixed a major bug with mosquito sting cooldown + some other tweaks
Challenge a shipmate to a duel! You are anonymous to the challenger and are seperated from the other shipmates

Both you and the challenger get teleported to the closest two rooms and then you have to fight it out. If you win a set amount of duels you win alone or leave in victory. But watch out. You also have a limited amnount of lives. If you lost your last life, you die (and pray for an altruist)
Special thanks to Espeon for providing assets
You are protected from a set amount of attacks. Your tally of protections amount will update after a meeting, if you haven't already died at that point.
Special thanks to Espeon for providing assets
- Changed Mosquito role description to include info about the Mosquito objects being clickable. Not everyone knew this. Oooopss..
- Added a local setting to disable Rainbow Camouflaged Comms for yourself when this is enabled by the host (settings tab). Sorry for the people who have Epilepsy
- Made sure buttons inside Divani Mods now respect Diseased effects (only on kill-related buttons)
- Added some more icons to Senitnel and Deadlock (Thanks Xinav)
- Fixed a bug where the cooldown is negated on the Sting button
- Fixed a bug where attacking a shielded player with the regular kill button did not reset the Sting cooldown
- Fixed a bug where the notification(Your mosquito stung "PLAYER") also got fired if that player is shielded.
- Fixed a bug where the cooldown is negated on the Give bomb button
- Fixed a bug where the cooldown does not always reset properly
- Fixed a visual bug which caused your buttons to appear if a meeting is called during the effect of Pickpocket
- Fixed the color on the notifications (they were purple, not Portalamker Blue)
- Added option to make it able to vent
- Paused timer while a Time Lord rewind is active
- Removed Giant,Mini,Flash from the stealing+random pool.

News.Title: New Roles and Modifier + Duelist option + adjustments
News.SubTitle: Retributionist, Clockstopper and UAV join Divani Mods!
Text: New Roles and Modifier + Duelist option + adjustments
When you get killed, you spawn on a random vent as the Vengeful Soul and you get a limited time to find and kill your killer.
If you succeed, you get to live again. If you fail, you become a normal ghost.
Your killer cannot vent or report and Concealing impostors and the Glitch cannot use their Buttons
Finish a set amount of tasks to reset kill- and ability-button cooldowns of Impostors and a configured set of Neutral roles.
Call in a UAV: while active, open the map to see everyone walking around.
If configured, teammates can see this effect too! Enemy teams are alerted about an active enemy UAV.
- Fixed a bug where a teleport-back causes a player to get stuck in walls
- Fixed a bug where trapper (Revealer-TOUE) recorded players in Duel.
- Fixed a bug where spectators and dead people couldn't see Duelists duelling
- Added option to configure Duel start spawns: Close (unchanged default), Far (two set points on each map far away from each other) or Random (Gamble, Gamble)
- Disable buttons of players returning to the ship
- When a duel ends, players get a red/green flash if they lose/win
